detail.description: Billy Cook singles on a ground ball to third baseman Joey Ortiz, deflected by pitcher Grant Anderson.
Billy Cook flies out to right fielder Luis Lara.
Billy Cook flies out to center fielder Julio Rodríguez.
Billy Cook singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder JJ Bleday. Jake Mangum to 2nd.
Rays challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Billy Cook singles on a bunt ground ball to catcher Hunter Feduccia. Joey Bart to 3rd.
Billy Cook grounds out, third baseman Junior Caminero to first baseman Jonathan Aranda.
Billy Cook singles on a soft bunt ground ball to catcher Drew Millas.
Billy Cook flies out to center fielder Jacob Young.
Billy Cook singles on a ground ball to right fielder Daylen Lile. Henry Davis to 2nd.

pitches.callDescription: Endy Rodríguez advances to 2nd on defensive indifference.
pitches.typeDescription: Endy Rodríguez advances to 2nd on defensive indifference.

detail.description: Billy Cook pops out to third baseman Alec Bohm in foul territory.

Billy Cook pops out to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo.
Billy Cook grounds out, third baseman Jose Fernandez to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas.
